title: Star Platinum's Microscopic Vision
fact: Star Platinum possesses eyesight so advanced it can act as a high-powered microscope, enabling Jotaro to spot minute details from miles away, such as a tiny fly hidden in a dark photograph.

title: Hermit Purple's Hamon Conduction
fact: Because it manifests as organic, thorny vines, Hermit Purple can be used to conduct Hamon energy across long distances, acting as a seamless extension of Joseph's martial arts training.

title: Magician's Red Psychic Heat Compass
fact: Magician's Red can shape its flames into a specialized psychic compass that tracks the unique heat signatures and breathing patterns of living organisms to locate hidden enemies.

title: Hierophant Green's Unraveled Core
fact: Hierophant Green is a long-range Stand that lacks a completely solid physical body, allowing it to unravel its entire form into hundreds of meters of microscopic tripwires.

title: Silver Chariot's Vacuum Slices
fact: Silver Chariot's rapier moves with such extreme speed and precision that it can slice apart individual flames or air currents, creating localized vacuums in its striking path.

title: The Fool's Sand Immunity
fact: Unlike standard Stands made of spiritual energy, The Fool is physically bound to ordinary sand, meaning it cannot be damaged by conventional enemy Stand attacks and possesses no fixed shape.

title: The World's Stopped Time Threshold
fact: The World possesses immense strength and speed that rivals Star Platinum, and its primary power allows DIO to halt the flow of time globally for a maximum duration of nine seconds.

title: Cream's Dimensional Erasure Void
fact: Cream swallows itself and its user into a void of pure nothingness, transforming into a floating sphere that completely erases any physical matter it collides with from existence.

title: Crazy Diamond's Component Attraction
fact: Crazy Diamond's restoration ability can track the individual components of a broken object across massive distances, pulling the user toward a piece or vice versa during reassembly.

title: The Hand's Palm Restriction
fact: The space-erasure property of The Hand is restricted entirely to its right palm; anything scraped away is sent to an unknown void, and the surrounding universe instantly snaps together to close the gap.

title: Echoes ACT3's Gravity Radius
fact: Echoes ACT3 must stay within a strict five-meter radius of its target to maintain its heavy gravitational 'Three Freeze' effect, with the weight rapidly dissipating if the target moves further away.

title: Heaven's Door Written Logic
fact: Heaven's Door transforms people into books to read their history, allowing Rohan to write completely impossible absolute rules into them—such as forcing a victim to fly backward at high speeds.

title: Killer Queen's Contact Bomb
fact: Killer Queen's primary ability turns any object or living being it touches into a manual bomb, allowing Kira to detonate the target completely without leaving any physical or forensic evidence behind.

title: Gold Experience's Biological Reflection
fact: Gold Experience imbues inanimate objects with life, transforming them into flora or fauna that obey basic biological instincts and automatically reflect incoming physical damage back to attackers.

title: Sticky Fingers' Pocket Dimensions
fact: Sticky Fingers creates fully functional zippers on any surface, allowing Bucciarati to separate his own body parts safely or construct large, hollow pocket dimensions inside solid concrete walls.

title: Sex Pistols' Dietary Needs
fact: Sex Pistols consists of six separate, sentient entities that require regular meals and rest to maintain their combat energy, frequently striking or slacking if they are not fed coffee-flavored treats.

title: Aerosmith's CO2 Tracking Radar
fact: Aerosmith is equipped with an integrated radar system that tracks targets solely by their carbon dioxide emissions, allowing Narancia to hunt enemies hidden behind solid obstacles.

title: Purple Haze's Sunlight Dissolution
fact: Purple Haze contains a highly lethal, flesh-eating virus within the glass bulbs on its knuckles, which completely dissolves organic matter within 30 seconds but breaks down instantly under standard sunlight.

title: King Crimson's Intangible Erasure
fact: King Crimson can erase up to ten seconds of time, during which Diavolo becomes completely intangible and invisible to others, allowing him to reposition perfectly before time resumes.

title: Stone Free's Acoustic Vibration
fact: Stone Free transforms Jolyne's body into a strong, flexible thread that can be used to listen to distant conversations by picking up acoustic sound vibrations like a classic string telephone.

title: Kiss's Kinetic Fusion Harm
fact: Kiss produces duplicates of objects using its lip stickers; once the sticker is peeled off, the two items violently fuse back together into a single object, causing massive structural damage.

title: Weather Report's Atmospheric Scale
fact: Weather Report can manipulate the atmosphere on a grand scale, allowing it to accurately recreate rare meteorological phenomena like raining down thousands of toxic dart frogs from distant biomes.

title: Diver Down's Internal Restructuring
fact: Diver Down can phase entirely inside solid objects or living beings to store its kinetic energy inside them, or physically restructure their internal mechanical and biological anatomy from the inside out.

title: Whitesnake's Conceptual Disc Melting
fact: Whitesnake melts a target's mind and soul into physical, compact discs that can be extracted to permanently extract and steal their Stand power or memories.

title: Tusk ACT1's Corpse Origin
fact: Tusk ACT1 manifests due to the power of a Holy Corpse part, allowing Johnny to use the Spin technique to rotate his fingernails rapidly and fire them off like high-velocity bullets.

title: Mandom's Wristwatch Anchor
fact: Mandom can rewind time by exactly six seconds, but Ringo psychosemantically restricts the activation of this ability by turning the mechanical dial of his wristwatch.

title: Catch the Rainbow's Liquid Stills
fact: Catch the Rainbow is a wearable mask Stand that allows Blackmore to physically freeze falling raindrops in mid-air, using them as solid floating stepping stones or razor-sharp stationary blades.

title: D4C's Sandwich Requirement
fact: Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap allows its user to travel between parallel dimensions, but Valentine must be pressed or 'sandwiched' between two physical objects, like a flag and the floor, to trigger the jump.

title: Soft & Wet's Quantum Lines
fact: Soft & Wet's bubbles are not actually filled with liquid, but are instead composed of incredibly thin, rapidly spinning spiritual lines that can plunder physical concepts like friction, sound, or eyesight.

title: Paisley Park's Binary Navigation
fact: Paisley Park is a long-range automated Stand that guides its user through electronic interfaces, presenting binary choices on digital devices to ensure they take the safest possible route.

title: Wonder of U's Universal Calamity
fact: Wonder of U manipulates the universal concept of calamity, causing any ordinary object—even a simple raindrop or a falling leaf—to strike a pursuing target with lethal kinetic force.

title: November Rain's Heavy Drops
fact: November Rain is a massive, non-humanoid Stand that creates localized downpours where each individual raindrop carries immense physical mass, heavy enough to crush human bone or pin vehicles down.

title: Smooth Operators' Property Slides
fact: Smooth Operators consists of a colony of small, robotic entities on wheels that can slide properties across surfaces, allowing them to shift wounds off a person's body or modify car parts effortlessly.
